name: workspace-areas
goal: Introduce Areas as persistent work domains that accumulate intelligence across quarters, simplify goals with area links, and enable context-aware meeting processing.

userStories.title: Create area and project templates
userStories.description: Add area template to DEFAULT_FILES in workspace-structure.ts and ensure areas/ directory is created on install. The template includes YAML frontmatter for recurring_meetings and standard markdown sections.
acceptanceCriteria: areas/ added to BASE_WORKSPACE_DIRS in packages/core/src/workspace-structure.ts

Area template added to DEFAULT_FILES with key areas/_template.md containing YAML frontmatter (area, status, recurring_meetings[]) and sections (Active Goals, Current State, Active Work, Key Decisions, Open Commitments, Backlog, Notes)
arete install creates areas/ directory in new workspaces
arete update backfills areas/ directory in existing workspaces
Unit tests verify template content and directory creation

userStories.title: Update context service for area-level resources
userStories.description: Extend context service to scan context/{slug}/ subdirectories and areas/*.md files using the existing 'context' category. TDD approach: write tests for existing paths FIRST.
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write tests for existing context paths FIRST, verify they pass before modifying
getRelevantContext() scans context/**/*.md (nested subdirectories)
getRelevantContext() scans areas/*.md files
Exclude context/_history/ from scanning (skip any path containing _history)
All discovered files use category 'context' (NOT a new 'area' category)
Files in context/glance-communications/notes.md appear in arete brief output
Existing context service tests continue to pass
New tests verify subdirectory scanning and _history exclusion

userStories.title: Create area parser service
userStories.description: Create service to parse area YAML frontmatter and provide meeting-to-area lookup with case-insensitive substring matching. CRITICAL: Must complete fully including PATTERNS.md before Phase 2.
acceptanceCriteria: Create packages/core/src/services/area-parser.ts
Parse YAML frontmatter: extract recurring_meetings[] with title, attendees[], frequency
Parse markdown sections: Current State, Key Decisions, Backlog
AreaMatch type: { areaSlug: string; matchType: 'recurring' | 'inferred'; confidence: number }
getAreaForMeeting(meetingTitle: string): AreaMatch | null with case-insensitive substring matching
Return null when no match (not { confidence: 0 })
Return highest-confidence match when multiple match (first match wins for equal confidence)
getAreaContext(areaSlug: string): AreaContext returns parsed area content
Add complete get_area_context pattern to packages/runtime/skills/PATTERNS.md with usage example
Uses StorageAdapter for all file I/O (no direct fs calls)
Unit tests: YAML parsing, case-insensitive matching, no-match returns null, multiple-match resolution
Given 'CoverWhale Sync', returns { areaSlug: 'glance-communications', matchType: 'recurring', confidence: 1.0 }

userStories.title: Add arete create area command
userStories.description: CLI command to scaffold new area with both area file and context directory, plus search index update.
acceptanceCriteria: Create packages/cli/src/commands/create.ts with create command group
arete create area <slug> subcommand
Creates areas/{slug}.md from template with placeholder values filled
Creates context/{slug}/ directory
Runs arete index to add new files to search index
Interactive prompts for: area name, initial description, first recurring meeting (optional)
Error handling: slug already exists, invalid slug format
Unit tests verify file creation, directory creation, and index trigger

userStories.title: Simplify goals with area links
userStories.description: Add optional area: field to goals for domain association.
acceptanceCriteria: Create goals/quarter.md template in DEFAULT_FILES with area?: string frontmatter field
Update goal parser (packages/core/src/services/goal-parser.ts) to read area?: string
arete goals list displays area column when goals have area values
arete goals list --area <slug> filters to goals with matching area (can defer if complex)
Goals without area: field continue to work unchanged
Unit tests: parsing with/without area, list filtering

userStories.title: Add area field to commitments
userStories.description: Add optional area: field to commitments for domain scoping. Area is metadata only — not part of dedup hash.
acceptanceCriteria: Add area?: string to Commitment type in packages/core/src/types.ts
Update commitment extraction to accept optional area parameter
Update CommitmentsService.sync() to store area field
Area field is NOT included in commitment dedup hash (metadata only)
arete commitments list displays area column when commitments have area values
arete commitments list --area <slug> filters to matching area
Existing commitments without area continue to work
Unit tests: creation with area, dedup ignores area, list filtering

userStories.title: Update meeting-prep skill for area context
userStories.description: Inject area context into meeting preparation briefs using the get_area_context pattern from PATTERNS.md.
acceptanceCriteria: Read packages/runtime/skills/PATTERNS.md and use get_area_context pattern
Use getAreaForMeeting() to identify meeting's area from title
When area found: inject area context (Current State, Key Decisions, Open Commitments) into prep
When area not found for recurring meeting: prompt user to select/create area association
Meeting prep for 'CoverWhale Sync' auto-pulls Glance Communications context
Skill file updated with area integration instructions

userStories.title: Update process-meetings skill for area inference
userStories.description: Map processed meetings to areas and route extracted intelligence (decisions, commitments) to area files.
acceptanceCriteria: 8a: For recurring meetings auto-map via getAreaForMeeting(); for one-off meetings infer from attendees + content, confirm if confidence < 0.7
8a: Processed meeting has area association in output
8b: Write extracted decisions to area's ## Key Decisions section with date-prefixed format (- YYYY-MM-DD: Decision description)
8b: New decision appears in correct area file
8c: Tag new commitments with area
8c: Scope de-duplication check to area first (check existing commitments in same area)
8c: Commitments from meeting are tagged with area
Skill file updated with area integration
Unit tests: area mapping, decision writing, commitment tagging

userStories.title: Update weekly planning skill
userStories.description: Include area-organized goals and commitments in weekly planning output.
acceptanceCriteria: Read goals with area links from goal parser
Pull open commitments grouped by area using commitments list --area
Include area context summaries in weekly priorities section
Weekly plan shows format: 'Glance Communications: 3 open commitments'
Skill file updated with area integration

userStories.title: Update daily planning skill
userStories.description: Include area context for today's scheduled meetings.
acceptanceCriteria: Pull area context for today's meetings via recurring meeting mapping
Use getAreaForMeeting() for each calendar event
Include relevant area state (Current State section) in daily focus
Daily plan notes area-specific context for today's meetings
Skill file updated with area integration

userStories.title: Update GUIDE.md and workspace documentation
userStories.description: Document the areas system for users including taxonomy, lifecycle, and design decisions.
acceptanceCriteria: Document Area vs. Project taxonomy (Area = persistent domain; Project = time-bound with area: link)
Document areas lifecycle: create → accumulate intelligence → archive
Document context hierarchy: company (context/) → area (context/{slug}/ + areas/{slug}.md) → project
Document recurring meeting mapping (YAML frontmatter in area file)
Document dual-location design decision (areas/ + context/{slug}/)
Update AGENTS.md with areas system summary
New users can understand area-based workflow from documentation

userStories.title: Add area setup to onboarding tool
userStories.description: Help new users set up initial areas during onboarding flow.
acceptanceCriteria: Add Day 1 area setup step: 'What are your main work domains?'
Present example areas (e.g., 'Customer: Acme Corp', 'Initiative: Platform Migration')
Scaffold 2-3 areas from user input using arete create area
Search index updated after area creation
New users have areas set up during onboarding flow
Onboarding tool tests verify area creation step
